titleStmt.title: SII 9.493: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 493. (A.R. No. 714 of 1922.) ON BOTH SIDES OF THE SOUTHERN ENTRANCE OF THE TEMPLE OF VIRUPAKSHA AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1435, Śrīmukha, Āshādḥa, śu. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1513 June 8 Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records the grant of some villages (named) and of the gift of gold vessels and plates by the kin for the service of the god Virūpākshadēva. The gift is stated to have been made on the occasion of a solar eclipse for his own well-being as well as for the merit of his father Narasaṇa-Nāyaka and his mother Nāgāji-Amma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīvirūpākṣadēvaru .
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē. trailōkyana
garāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyu
dayaśālivāhana(hana)ṣakavaruṣa
1435 neya śrīmukhasaṁvacharada
Āṣāḍha śu 5 lu śrimatu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīvīrakruṣṇadēvamahā
rāyarū śrīvirūpākṣadēvarige Ā
mrutapaḍi naivēdyakū Aṁgaraṁgavayi
bhōga nityanayimitika cayi
tramāsada rathōtsaha makarasaṁkrāṁ
tiya rathōtsaha māsōtsaha pakṣō
tsaha saṁvatsarōtsaha dīpārā
dhane paṁcaparva modalāda pu(ṁ)ṇya
tithigaḷū mahāpūjegaḷigū sama
rpisidu śrīkruṣṇarāyamahā
rāyara paṭadalū biṭṭa ciṁninā
yakanahaḷḷi grāma 1 prāku salu
va grāmagaḷū kāḷagaṭṭaya grā 1
daṇāyakapurada grāma 1 rāma
caṁdrāpurada grāma 1 kaṁcu
maṁtinakupe grāma 1 Ayōdi grā 1
hoṁnāpurada grāma 1 vijeya ni
purada grāma 1 maṁḍanūra
grāmagaḷū dammūra grāma 1 bha
yiravadēvanahaḷiya grāma 1 kalu
kaṁbhada grāma 1 gōnahāḷa grā 1
guṁḍeganūra grāma 1 pāḍirāla
grāma 1 mudegeṟeya grāma 1
vritti mānya tōṭigaḷū sahā
sakala bhattādāya sakala suvarnā
dāya sakala sā(ṁ)mya jōḍi birā
ḍa suṁka sā(ṁ)mya kaṭu ta
ḷavāṟake jōḍikeya birā
ḍa kāluveya nīra birāḍa
sahavāgi Ēnuṁṭādanu
sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi naṁma taṁ
de narasaṇanāyakavoḍeyarigeU naṁma
tāyi nāgājiAṁmanavarigeU dha
rmmavāgi sūryyagrahaṇapu(ṁ)ṇyakā
ladalu Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi
naḍava mariyādelu dhāreneṟa
du samarpisteU yī dharmmake Ā
rūbaru tapidare taṁma taṁde tāyiga
ḷa vāraṇāsili koṁda pāpagaḷige
hōdavaru gōhatyāpātakagaḷū bra
(ṁ)hmahatyāpātaka strīhatyāsātaka
bhruṇahatyāpātakagaḷū modalā
gi Aśvēti modalāda mahāpāpakke
hōharu . śrīkruṣṇarāyarū śrīvi
rūpākṣadēvarige samarpisida nā
gābharaṇa 1 navaratnada tāvarekama
la 1 ci(ṁ)nnada harivāṇa 1 cinnada
Ārati halage 2 beḷiya Āratiya
halage 34 �yo Āratigaḷanu kruṣṇarā
yamahārāyarū namage dharmmavāgabē
keṁdu samarppisideU .
Digital edition of SII 9.493 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
